summary:
The available literature lacks studies evaluating para-cervical blocks during gemeprost-based abortions in the second trimester; thus, no clinically supported benefits have been established for its use beyond routine care. 

\boxed{\text{No}}

\boxed{\text{No}}. Answer choice: B
